---
title: "Spring Semester Goals"
author: "Your Name"
date: 2026-02-27
categories: [goals, daily-entries]
description: "Spring 2026 Goals"
image: ""
---

# Overview

Spring 2026 goals

## Goals

### Writing and Manuscripts 

1. Something

### Analysis and Benchwork

1. Something

### Funding

1. Submit Charles Center Proposal 

### Other

1. Set up digital notebook

# Primary Skill Building

- [ ] nicer presentation slides
- [ ] something
- [ ] something
